headline: Oklahoma seeks momentum against struggling Colorado squad
subhead: Both teams desperate for wins, but Oklahoma has shown recent offensive capability.

xFactor.why: The quarterback's ability to manage tempo and avoid costly mistakes will separate these two struggling offenses.

keyMatchup: Oklahoma's passing game efficiency versus Colorado's secondary coverage, which has been exposed in recent losses.
body: Oklahoma arrives in Boulder off a statement win over Notre Dame that proved this roster can compete when executing properly. The 34-31 victory showed the offense can sustain drives and the defense can make stops in crucial moments, giving the staff something tangible to build on heading into a matchup against another team searching for answers.

Colorado's recent collapse against Penn State, losing 38-14, revealed defensive vulnerabilities that Oklahoma's passing attack may be able to exploit. Both programs are desperate for a conference win, but Oklahoma's recent offensive success gives them the clearer path forward in this matchup between two ranked but genuinely fragile teams.
